title: coleus defoliatus
intro: Coleus defoliatus, also known as Solenostemon scutellarioides, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves of the Coleus defoliatus plant have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Coleus defoliatus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Coleus defoliatus are typically made from the leaves and roots, which can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
